The '''Kumauri Empire''' was a realm of several dozen [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] established by the [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Vall Kumauri]] around [[10,000 BBY]], on what was then the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|rimward frontier]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==History==
The Kumauri Empire was short-lived, quickly absorbed by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], but its legacy survived in a series of massive [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] capable of [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|planetary bombardment]], known as the ''[[Kumauri Battleship]]''. The last line in the series was the three [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometer]] long [[Cal-class battleship|''Cal''-class battleship]]. The primary weapons of these [[Warship/Legends|warships]] were [[Mass-driver cannon/Legends|mass drivers]] that could launch [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] at surface targets, and were only rendered obsolete by the development of effective [[Planetary shield/Legends|planetary shields]].<ref name="CRO" />
